title: Isn't It Romantic
writer: Richard L. Breen, Josef Mischel, Jeannette C. Nolan
actors: Veronica Lake, Mona Freeman, Mary Hatcher
plot: In rural 19th-century Indiana, the three daughters of a Civil War veteran are courted by three young men--one a sophisticated city slicker who sells phony oil stock, the second a local eccentric and the third a stolid country boy.
